metadata.note: Rankings derived from ACS 5-year estimates, DOLA population projections, HUD CHAS cost-burden data, and AMI gap modeling. Generated by scripts/hna/build_ranking_index.py.

metrics.label: Housing Units Needed (30% AMI)
metrics.description: Deficit of affordable housing units at 30% AMI

metrics.label: % Rent-Burdened Households
metrics.description: Percentage of renter households paying ≥30% of income on housing

metrics.label: Units Needed at 30% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 30% of Area Median Income

metrics.label: Population (20-yr Projection)
metrics.description: DOLA-projected population approximately 20 years from base year

metrics.label: Median Household Income
metrics.description: ACS median household income (most recent vintage)

metrics.label: % Renter-Occupied
metrics.description: Percentage of occupied housing units that are renter-occupied
